meaning: adj.精心制作的,详细阐述的,精细vt.精心制作,详细阐述v.详细描述
examples: She went on to elaborate her argument.
She concocted some elaborate story to explain her absence.
According to the prosecution, the officers manufactured an elaborate story.
All of this makes the area much more elaborate and glamorous than it used to be.
There is an elaborate gilded monument to the estimated 14, 000 victims in the nearby village of Stryzhavka.
